title: Ender Cane
description: Added an item for a player to teleport to easily save coordinates with consuming ender pearls
body:
Added an item for a player to teleport to easily save coordinates with consuming ender pearls

Hold the End Cane and right click to teleport to the set coordinates.
While sneaking (shift), holding an Ender Cane and right-clicking opens a GUI where you can save the current coordinates of your player or the block you right-clicked on to the Ender Cane.

It is also possible to take out the ender pearl that was put in from the GUI.
Consumes ender pearls for each teleport.
The number of ender pearls you can get depends on the Ender Cane.


- Max ender pearls
- Pure Ender Cane: 64
- Medium Ender Cane: 256
- Advanced Ender Cane: 1024
